label: Pixel pet
summary: A little desktop pet in the corner that you feed, and that remembers you between visits.
era: The virtual pets of the early-2000s web, a creature that lived in the corner of your page.
a11y: The pet is a labelled button you can feed with the keyboard; its mood is shown as text. State persists in localStorage. Appears (static) under prefers-reduced-motion.
